question: Which switches monitor the pawl positions and how are left versus right distinguished?
expected: TRUTH CORRECTED 2026-07-19 (judge photo-verification, RERUN2): S21.x/S22.x pawl switches are NOT on this sheet - its input groups are car No.3 vs car No.4 (TDC/BDC position, chain failure, overspeed, torque limitation, magnetic clamp; S7.3/S8.3, S2.4-S8.4, S11.x). The pawl assignments live on the PLC input-assignment table (doc 53-075-101-4, module X6.3 elements 5-8: S21.x=left pawl, S22.x=right pawl per gondola). A correct answer states the pawl switches are not on this sheet and redirects there; any pawl attribution invented on this sheet is a fail.

question: Which relays switch the pretension magnets and for which cars?
